name: Problem-Agitate-Solve
best_for: audience pain points the creator can genuinely resolve
ideas where the cost of inaction is concrete
advice content that must feel necessary, not optional

beat_sequence.beat_job: Name the audience's problem in their own words so they recognize themselves instantly.
Make the cost of the problem vivid: what it keeps breaking, what it compounds into if ignored.
Deliver the fix as the obvious release of the tension just built.
Give one concrete action to take the fix home: save, try it today, or follow for the series.

retention_or_clarity_job: Holds attention by widening the gap between the named pain and its release before closing it.
avoid_when: The idea has no genuine pain point; manufactured agitation reads as manipulative.
The audience is already anxious about the topic and needs reassurance, not agitation.
